title: [Governance] Move inactive maintainers to alumni and clarify Github permissions
body:
Two commits, which I have batched together because I don't think they are controversial but can separate if desired.

First: move Urvashi and Valentin to Alumni, as they are no longer active in the project. I have contacted both and they have agreed.

Second: explicitly spell out the Github permissions each level of the contributor hierarchy has access to, as agreed to in core maintainer discussion.

```release-note
NONE
```

comments.body:
@Luap99 @baude @nalind @mtrmac @giuseppe PTAL.

I am LGTM on both changes for the record.
LGTM, @mtrmac you are last, so you get to merge.
It's very nitty, but we really should change "Github" to "GitHub" throughout.  Otherwise, LGTM
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
Roger, I'll get this rebased and merged.
@baude @Luap99 Someone want to press the merge button on this?

Looks like Toms GitHub spelling comments were not fixed, not that I particular care but it would be nice to either implement the suggestions of a reviewer or explicitly state why one is dismissing them.
